title: Capital Grants 2025
body: "  Capital Grants 2025 is closed for applications.  You can apply for other CS capital grants at any time of the year.   The Capital Grants 2025 manual consists of:   applicant’s guidance agreement holder’s guidance terms and conditions    Read the agreement holder’s guide to find out how to manage your agreement and make a claim for payment.   Capital Grants are 3-year agreements offering capital items to achieve specific environmental benefits within 6 groups:   boundaries, trees and orchards improved water quality improved air quality improved natural flood management assessments improvements   Contact Rural Payments Agency (RPA)  You can contact RPA by email, phone or post.   Rural Payments Agency  PO Box 324 Worksop S95 1DF  Email: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 200 301 Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5pm, except bank holidays Find out about call charges   "
